demo.title: economyos-loop.ts

setup: Set `ECONOMYOS_API_URL` (the EconomyOS agent-api host) and `ECONOMYOS_CHAIN` (`base-sepolia` or `solana-devnet`)
Point the signer env at the agent's wallet: `ECONOMYOS_PRIVATE_KEY` (EVM) or `ECONOMYOS_SOLANA_KEYPAIR` (Solana) — user-held, never logged
Fund the wallet with testnet USDC, then run the demo loop (testnet only for now)
